articles.title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026 | Constituency watch
articles.description: A collection of stories on some of the key constituencies in Kerala that are set to elect their representatives to Kerala Legislative Assembly in 2026

articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Can Ganesh Kumar’s personal bastion of Pathanapuram be breached this time?
articles.description: Transport Minister K.B. Ganesh Kumar is seeking his 6th term from the Pathanapuram Assembly constituency. The United Democratic Front has once again fielded Kerala Pradesh Congress Committee general secretary Jyothikumar Chamakkala, who managed to reduce Ganesh Kumar’s previously massive majority to 14,336 votes in the last election

articles.title: 13-year-old girl killed in sacrifice in Jharkhand: Mother, tantrik, one other nabbed; NCW forms panel to probe
articles.description: The police said they had arrested Reshmi Devi, the mother of the girl, 55-year-old Shanti Devi, an occultist, and 40-year-old Bhim Ram, all of them from the same village

topStories.description: Harlan Ullman, a former senior US naval officer, has slammed President Trump’s address to the nation.

topStories.title: Trump claims ‘success’ in Iran in just 32 days compared to lengthy US wars
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said Iran was the ‘bully of the Middle East’ but is ‘no longer a threat’.

topStories.title: Trump threatens to bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages’
topStories.description: President Trump says the US will bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages where they belong' by striking hard.

topStories.title: Trump urges countries ‘get involved’ in war on Iran if they can’t get fuel
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump says nations that rely on oil from the Strait of Hormuz should build up some delayed courage.

topStories.title: Why Amazon data centers in the Gulf are facing Iranian military strikes? Report says…
topStories.description: Amazon's cloud operations in Bahrain were damaged by an Iranian strike, according to a latest report. The attacks follows Iran's threats against American companies in the Middle East just a day earlier.

topStories.title: Tiger Woods declines 2027 Ryder Cup captaincy; can leave US for treatment
topStories.description: The 15-time major winner will focus on health following his car crash and subsequent DUI arrest on Friday.

topStories.title: Trump Speech highlights: What US President said about Iran war ‘ending’? What it means for you?
topStories.description: President Trump addressed the rationale for the war against Iran, emphasising the need for military action for national security. He provided few new details and indicated no immediate end to the conflict, which could lead to inflation and rising prices for consumers.

topStories.title: ‘More confusion than clarity’: Analysts question Trump’s Iran war messaging in televised address
topStories.description: In the 19-minute-long televised address, while Trump spoke about almost completing the war objectives in Iran, he also threatened that Washington would strike Iran ‘extremely hard’ over the next two to three ⁠weeks and hit the country into the ‘Stone Ages.’

topStories.title: Rupee Opens 1% Higher Above 93-Mark Against US Dollar
topStories.description: Rupee Opens 1% Higher At 92.77 Against US Dollar After RBI Curbs On Offshore Derivatives

topStories.title: Trump leaves key questions unanswered as he seeks to calm nerves over Iran war
topStories.description: There were some glaring omissions in the president's primetime address, writes the BBC's Gary O'Donoghue.

topStories.title: Oil prices up 5% as Trump threatens of further escalation
topStories.description: Crude prices jumped over 5% after US President Donald Trump warned of hitting Iran “extremely hard” within weeks, dashing ceasefire hopes and deepening supply fears via Hormuz.

topStories.title: Votes to independents will help BJP: Siddaramaiah in Davangere South
topStories.description: CM Siddaramaiah urges Davanagere South voters to support Congress in April 9 by-election, claiming BJP spreads misinformation and warning against independent candidates.

dailyNews.description: Trump said he is open to a deal with the Islamic Republic, only to say that one was not necessary to end the war. There was also mixed messaging on whether he would insist that Iran fully reopen the...

dailyNews.title: US-Iran War: Trump Signals End To Conflict, Experts Say 'Oil Shock' Still Remains
dailyNews.description: Trump struck a dual tone-declaring that strategic objectives are "nearing completion" while warning of intensified strikes over the next two to three weeks.

dailyNews.title: "Horrible, Evil Genius": Trump Recalls Killing Of Iran's Qasem Soleimani
dailyNews.description: Qasem Soleimani, the former Iran's Revolutionary Guards commander, was killed in a US strike in January 2020.

dailyNews.title: Congress, farmer bodies slam M.P. govt over delay in wheat procurement; BJP blames bag shortage due to West Asia war
dailyNews.description: Several farmers’ organisations, including the Bharatiya Kisan Sangh (BKS) have also criticised the government and demanded the procurement be started soon

dailyNews.title: Oil Price Today (April 2): Oil jumps 5% to cross $106/barrel after Trump's comments erase de-escalation hopes
dailyNews.description: Oil prices have jumped back above $106 a barrel. President Donald Trump's speech revived fears of more conflict in the Middle East. This comes after earlier hopes for peace had briefly lowered prices. Experts believe oil prices will stay high due to damage and risks. The situation suggests continued volatility in the short term.

dailyNews.description: Iran US War LIVE: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday claimed Iran’s president wanted a ceasefire ahead of his speech to the American people. Trump made the claim on his Truth Social website.

dailyNews.title: 7-month-old baby killed by stray bullet in Brooklyn shooting, police say
dailyNews.description: Seven-month-old Kaori Patterson-Moore was killed by a stray bullet in Brooklyn after a gunman on a moped opened fire on a crowded street, police say.

dailyNews.title: NYPD cop's killer convicted of manslaughter, not guilty of murder after split jury ordered to deliberate more
dailyNews.description: The man charged for killing NYPD Detective Jonathan Diller during a 2024 Queens traffic stop was convicted of manslaughter but acquitted of murder.

dailyNews.title: Sham Philadelphia coffee shop hiding crack operation busted in sweeping raid, 17 arrested: AG
dailyNews.description: Philadelphia officials dismantled a drug ring at a sham coffee shop in 'Operation Cocaine and Coffee,' arresting 17 and seizing 27 guns and drugs.

dailyNews.title: Former Cowboys player Trysten Hill appears to grin after arrest tied to alleged assault of pregnant woman
dailyNews.description: Former NFL player Trysten Hill was taken into custody in Ellis County, Texas, on charges of assaulting a pregnant woman and interfering with an emergency request for assistance.

dailyNews.description: Trump declares Iran "no longer a threat" after a 32-day military campaign, claiming nuclear sites were destroyed by B-2 bombers and warning of more strikes.

dailyNews.title: Billy Porter blames Trump as jobs dry up after 'performative wokeness' wave
dailyNews.description: Billy Porter said the era of "performative wokeness" is over and arts job opportunities are drying up, speaking out on the shifting entertainment landscape.

dailyNews.title: Trump is right about NATO’s weakness; the real question is how does America fix it
dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz crisis exposed NATO's deep fault lines as Germany refused to act and Spain denied airspace, revealing burden-sharing failures.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Colbert mocks Trump fans who still support the president: 'Who are you?'
dailyNews.description: Comedian Stephen Colbert took aim at the people who still support President Donald Trump during a scathing monologue on "The Late Show" Tuesday night.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration makes major move to relieve 'unfair burden' on DHS workers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: As the shutdown hits day 46, the Trump administration offered rare tax relief to DHS workers still reporting without pay, waiving penalties and interest.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Robert De Niro brushes off 'Trump Derangement Syndrome' label hurled by critics
dailyNews.description: Robert De Niro appeared at the Supreme Court to hear justices' oral arguments on a major case that the High Court is weighing and bashed the president on his way out.

dailyNews.title: Trump Initially Laid Out Five Goals for the Iran War. Here’s Where They Stand.
dailyNews.description: The United States and Israel have done significant damage to Iran’s military capabilities. But Iran still fires missiles, has nuclear material and coordinates with militias in the region.

dailyNews.title: Iran Is Skeptical About Diplomacy, U.S. Intelligence Says
dailyNews.description: Any decision by Iran to keep fighting would complicate President Trump’s stated goal of trying to end the war within weeks.

dailyNews.title: Senate and House Republicans Strike Deal to End DHS Shutdown
dailyNews.description: A bill to reopen the department, which the House G.O.P. rejected on Friday, could be approved as early as Thursday. It was a sharp turnaround by the lawmakers and President Trump.
